# vertexCount

**Instance Property**

The number of vertices that define the polygon-shaped area of the obstacle.

## Declaration

```swift
var vertexCount: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

Obstacles are immutable objects; to change the shape of an obstacle, remove it and create a new obstacle with a new list of vertices. Use this property along with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKPolygonObstacle/vertex(at:)] method to inspect an existing obstacle—for example, to draw a debugging overlay representing the obstacle in your game.

## Inspecting Vertices

- **vertex(at:)**: Returns the point coordinates of the specified vertex.
